Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Always Hungry, LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Pir Pica, and Khalid Mushasha, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana Robles, CSR #14212. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Ryan L. Dahm, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Trimark ERF, Inc., a Delaware corporation, dba Economy Restaurant Fixtures.
Janice Condon-Cook, Credit & Collections Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Always Hungry, LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Pir Pica, or Khalid Mushasha, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint for Goods Sold and Delivered was filed on March 21, 2019 and personally served on defendants Always Hungry, LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Pir Pica, and Khalid Mushasha, an individual, on April 1, 2019.
Default as to defendants Always Hungry, LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Pir Pica, and Khalid Mushasha, an individual, was entered on May 21, 2019.
DOE defendants were dimissed today, December 19, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Trimark ERF, Inc., a Delaware corporation, dba Economy Restaurant Fixtures, and against the defaulted defendants Always Hungry, LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Pir Pica, and Khalid Mushasha, an individual, as follows:

Damages - $51,437.53.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,155.77.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $577.00.
Total - $55,170.30.

Additionally, Judgment shall include the recovery of equipment listed in Exhibit A.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
